subcodes.first_line: Divine rays of Guidance are scattering wide, The Sinai of righteousness shineth once more; The spirit of Moses is yearning for Thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: نور هدی تابان شده طور تقی رخشان شده موسی بجان پویان شده کهسار سیناء آمده صبح
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as sun, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
